title: DocumentInput
description: A document image to extract structured data from. Each document comes with a json_schema describing the expected output fields.

content.description: Relative path to the document image file (e.g., `images/DOC-OCR-0869.png`), resolved against the directory containing this `public_eval_50.json` file.

content_format.description: Format of the content field. Always `image_path` for the public eval; the hidden eval may use other formats.

json_schema.description: JSON schema (as a string) describing the expected output structure. Each document has a different schema.
